title: MiniBook
description: Create and open custom books with style, ease, and rich formatting.
body:
![Header](https://assets.drygo.dev/uploads/modrinth/minibook/header.webp)
# MiniBook 📘

**MiniBook** is a powerful and flexible custom book management plugin for Minecraft servers. It allows server administrators and developers to create, manage, and display fully customizable books with rich formatting, permissions, and premium support.

### Key Features 💫

* **Custom Book Creation** – Create and manage multiple books with ease.
* **Rich Formatting** – Use MiniMessage to add colors, gradients, click events, and more.
* **Premium Books** – Restrict access to specific books using permissions.
* **Per-Player Interaction** – Open or give books to individual players or all online players.
* **Welcome Book Support** – Automatically open a book when players join the server.
* **API Support** – Powerful static API to create, delete, and open books programmatically.
* **User-Friendly Commands** – Simple and intuitive command system for fast management.

### Useful Links 🔗

* [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/xDrygo/MiniBook) – Access the source code, latest releases, and submit **Issues** for bug reports, feature requests, or questions.
* [Wiki Documentation](https://wiki.drygo.dev/minibook) – Guides for commands, configuration files, permissions, and API usage.

### Support ❓

For technical issues, unexpected behavior, or feature suggestions, please submit an **Issue** on the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/xDrygo/MiniBook/issues). This helps keep feedback organized and ensures faster responses.

---

MiniBook is designed to provide a **clean, elegant, and powerful book system**, allowing Minecraft servers to deliver information, tutorials, rules, and premium content in a polished and interactive way!
